_meta.note: All flows traced from actual code paths only. No intended/designed flows included.

flow_steps.action: Process starts. Reads process.env.PORT. Throws Error if missing or non-numeric. Calls app.listen(port).
flow_steps.side_effects: logger.info({ port }) on success; process.exit(1) on error

flow_steps.action: Incoming request is logged. Serializer strips query string from URL; captures method and status code.
flow_steps.data_out: Logged req {id, method, url} via pino

flow_steps.action: CORS headers added to response. No configuration — uses cors() defaults (all origins).
Body parsed. For GET /healthz this is a no-op (no body).
Router receives request at /api prefix. Delegates to healthRouter (no sub-path prefix).
Handler matches GET /healthz. Calls HealthCheckResponse.parse({ status: 'ok' }). If Zod parse fails (it won't with hardcoded input), throws ZodError. On success, calls res.json(data).

failure_points: Step 1: process.exit(1) if PORT env var is absent or non-numeric
Step 6: ZodError if HealthCheckResponse schema changes to require additional fields (currently unreachable with hardcoded input)

flow_steps.action: React app bootstraps. createRoot().render(<App />) called.
Reads import.meta.env.BASE_URL. Strips trailing slash.
flow_steps.data_in: import.meta.env.BASE_URL (set by Vite from BASE_PATH env var)

flow_steps.action: Reads window.location.pathname. Strips basePath prefix. Applies regex /^\/preview\/(.+)$/. Returns capture group or null.
If componentPath is non-null, renders PreviewRenderer. Otherwise renders Gallery.

Effect fires on componentPath or modules change. Constructs key './components/mockups/{componentPath}.tsx'. Looks up loader function in discoveredModules map. If not found, sets error state. If found, calls loader() (dynamic import). On module resolution calls _resolveComponent(mod, name).
flow_steps.side_effects: setComponent() or setError() state updates trigger re-render

flow_steps.action: Checks mod.default, then mod.Preview, then mod[name], then last exported function. Returns first match.
flow_steps.data_in: ES module object, component name string

flow_steps.action: Renders resolved ComponentType with no props.

failure_points: Step 5: Key not in discoveredModules → sets error 'No component found at {path}.tsx'
Step 5: dynamic import() rejects → sets error 'Failed to load preview. {message}'
Step 6: No exported function found → sets error 'No exported React component found in ...'
Step 2: Vite server not running → entire flow fails before React mounts

flow_steps.action: Component mounts. Initial state set: activeNav='org', controlState={scenarioId:'DEFAULT_VIEW', selectedPositionId:'1-001', selectedEmployeeId:'e-001', resolvedActions:[], positionEdits:[], onboardingCompleted:[]}.

useMemo computes uiState. Calls applyPositionEdits(SEED, []) → returns SEED unchanged. Merges controlState with SCENARIOS['DEFAULT_VIEW']. Calls computeSignals(), buildOrgTree(), computeActions(), computeRisks(). Returns UIState object.
flow_steps.data_in: SEED (26 positions, 14 employees, 7 compliance items), controlState
flow_steps.data_out: UIState { selectedPosition, selectedEmployee, orgTree, signals, actions, complianceView, directReports, stats, signalSummary, risks, riskScore, riskBreakdown }

flow_steps.action: User clicks scenario button. setControlState called with new scenarioId. useMemo recomputes uiState.
User clicks nav item. setActiveNav(section) called. Renders different view panel (org tree, risk heatmap, employees, compliance, actions).
flow_steps.data_out: Updated activeNav → conditional render of view panel

flow_steps.action: User clicks org node card. setControlState called with new selectedPositionId. useMemo recomputes uiState with new selectedPosition, directReports, complianceView.
User clicks 'Resolve' on action. setControlState called with resolvedActions: [...prev, actionId]. useMemo recomputes: resolved actions are excluded from signals/actions output.
flow_steps.data_out: Updated controlState.resolvedActions → signals and actions filtered in new UIState
flow_steps.side_effects: React re-render, action disappears from list

flow_steps.action: User sets editingPosition. PositionForm renders. User submits form. setControlState called with positionEdits: [...prev, { id, title, department }]. useMemo recomputes: applyPositionEdits applies edits to SEED copy.
flow_steps.data_in: Form submit event, PositionEdit { id, title, department }
flow_steps.data_out: Updated controlState.positionEdits → mutated SEED copy in compute, updated position titles in OrgTree
flow_steps.side_effects: React re-render, position title changes in org tree display

flow_steps.action: User types in search input. setEmployeeSearch(value) called. Employees list filtered client-side by name match.
User clicks JSON toggle. setShowJson(!showJson). JsonInspectorPanel renders with JSON.stringify(uiState, null, 2).

failure_points: No failure points under normal operation — pure in-memory state machine
computeUIState could return incorrect stats if SEED.employees data is malformed (no runtime validation)

flow_steps.action: Component renders. Reads SEED.employees directly (module-level import). Maps over employees array. Renders table rows with avatar initials, name, status, email, phone, location.
Component renders with hovered=null. Maps SEED.employees to card grid.
User hovers card. setHovered(employee.id) on mouseEnter. setHovered(null) on mouseLeave. Card style conditionally changes.
flow_steps.data_out: hovered state update → card visual state change

flow_steps.action: Component renders. Groups SEED.employees by status ('active', 'on_leave', 'offboarding'). Renders accordion sections per status group.
User clicks section header. setOpen called with toggled boolean for that status key.
Vite dev server starts. Plugin scans src/components/mockups/**/*.tsx (excludes _ prefixed). Generates src/.generated/mockup-components.ts with module map of dynamic imports.
chokidar watches src/components/mockups/**/*.tsx. On add or unlink event, re-scans and rewrites module map.
If request matches /preview/* and returns 404, plugin triggers rescan.

failure_points: Step 1: PORT or BASE_PATH env vars absent → vite.config.ts throws before plugin runs
Step 2: File system permissions issue → watcher fails silently or throws
